---
title: "Maple60's Website"
description: "English pages for Maple60's notes on R, Python, Quarto, and research workflows."
lang: en
listing:
  contents: "posts/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  max-items: 6
  date-format: iso
  fields: [date, title, description]
  field-links: [title]
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

::: {.callout-note}
Japanese homepage: [Home](../index.qmd)
:::

## About

This section collects English pages for a personal blog and notebook about programming, data analysis, reproducible documents, and research tooling.

## Topics

- **R and data analysis**: Visualization, maps, image processing, statistics, and reproducible analysis workflows.
- **Quarto and GitHub Pages**: Website publishing, rendering settings, code links, GitHub Actions, and Japanese text support.
- **Python and tooling**: Environment management with `uv` and small automation notes.
- **Research workflow**: Zotero, literature notes, citation management, and data organization.

## Navigation

Translated posts are listed on [English Posts](posts.qmd). The original Japanese post list is available on [Posts](../posts.qmd).

English translations are added incrementally. If a post is not listed here yet, please see the Japanese archive.

## Recent English Posts
